blocks.text: Match preview: TBC face TBC in Final (T20) on Fri, 17 Jul, 2026, 11:15 pm at Kennington Oval London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
Partly cloudy · High 30°C / Low 17°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
